commands.author: wangmiao0668000666

target.title: fix(media-understanding): append actionable install hint when media provider is missing
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

When a user has configured a media provider plugin that is not installed (e.g. `groq` after externalization), OpenClaw throws the unhelpful `Error: Media provider not available: groq`. Users have no actionable hint about how to install the missing plugin.

This PR appends a catalog-backed install hint to 3 throw sites where a media provider is missing.

## Changes

- `src/media-understanding/runner.entries.ts:676-732` — new `formatMissingProviderHint` helper that looks up the id in the official external provider catalog and returns a formatted hint with install + registry refresh + gateway restart + doctor fix commands. Returns empty string for non-cataloged ids (tier 2), empty/non-plugin-shaped ids (tier 3), and channel-only ids like `feishu`.
- 3 throw sites modified to append the hint: provider not found (`:799`), audio transcription not available (`:809`), video understanding not available (`:887`).
- `src/media-understanding/runner.entries.guards.test.ts` — 7 new inline tests covering all tiers and backward-compat.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior addressed**: `Error: Media provider not available: groq` now includes the actionable hint.
- **Real environment tested**: drives production `formatMissingProviderHint` directly with real catalog entries (amazon-bedrock, groq, feishu, mystery-provider). Node v22.22.0.
- **Evidence after fix**:
  ```
  === Media provider missing hint output ===
  
    PASS tier 1 includes install command
    PASS tier 1 includes registry refresh
    PASS tier 1 includes gateway restart
    PASS tier 1 includes doctor fix
    PASS tier 1 includes official external wording
    tier 1 full hint:  Install the official external plugin with: openclaw plugins install @openclaw/amazon-bedrock-provider, then run openclaw plugins registry --refresh and restart the gateway, or run openclaw doctor --fix to repair automatically.
  
    PASS tier 1 groq includes install command
    PASS tier 2 returns empty string
    PASS channel-only id (feishu) returns empty
    PASS non-cataloged preserves legacy message exactly
    ... (15/15 total)
  
  === All formatMissingProviderHint assertions passed (15/15) ===
  ```
- **What was not tested**: live Gateway with missing provider; cross-platform Node differences.

## Out of scope

- Plugin-registry refresh lifecycle for the channel path (separate issue).
- Provider-only catalog narrowing — the hint is restricted to the provider catalog (feishu returns empty), matching the current catalog schema.

## Risk

- **Low**: error message is enriched, not replaced. Tier 1 preserves the legacy prefix exactly. Tier 2/3 return empty string — legacy message preserved verbatim. No behavior regression for existing configurations.
- **Tested**: 10/10 existing + new unit tests pass.

## Diff stats

```
2 files changed, 119 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)
```
